programmes.show_description: A pro surfer from a country with no surf, strange treats and even stranger outings, roads repaired while you sleep, and an empire of flowers built floor by floor.

Michelin star chef Alvin Leung and Korean Celebrity chef Matthew Chung will be visiting different home and restaurants in Korea, in search of home made traditional foods and uncovering recipes that ha
